special_mechanics.name: Regular Jump
special_mechanics.description: Wayne can perform a regular jump action

special_mechanics.name: Flip Jump
special_mechanics.description: A special high flip jump activated by pressing A and Up on D-pad, described as 'cool major-high flip jump'

special_mechanics.name: Guitar Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Wayne is equipped with a guitar weapon that can be powered up with amps for larger chords, chorus power-ups for multiple simultaneous chords, distortion for curved projectile paths, and homing capability

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Sources provide gameplay mechanics overview but no precise physics values. Documentation focuses on level design, enemies, and collectibles rather than movement parameters. Jump mechanics are mentioned qualitatively but without numerical specifications.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor (Wayne's World SNES article)
